chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision Application No.D-16 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.472/2024 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA No.366/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 30.05.2024 Mr. Humail Rafi, Advocate for the Applicant ***************** 1. Granted. 2to4. Learned Counsel for the Applicant does not press instant Cr. Revision Applicant and seeks liberty to file fresh application under Section 23 of ATA, 1997 before the trial Court as, according to him, the relevant facts have not been properly considered by the trial Court. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Addl. PG, present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and recorded no objection. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed as not pressed; however, petitioner may repeat application under Section 23 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997 before the trial Court for decision afresh independence of previous order. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
